summary: Category mismatch bug fix verified successfully. All 6 categories now display correctly in What's Needed tab with proper category names matching backend MANDATORY_ITEMS. All 4 previously hidden items (Health Screening Questionnaire, Induction & Competency Assessment, Interview Record, Recruitment Compliance Checklist) are now visible with 'Still Needed' labels. Progress shows 81% (18/22 completed) which matches visible item counts.
passed_tests: ✅ All 6 categories visible: Legal & Safety, Core Training, Supervised Start / Health, Recruitment File, Agreements, Admin / Other
✅ Category names match backend MANDATORY_ITEMS (3_Competency_Health -> 'Supervised Start / Health', 4_Recruitment_Record -> 'Recruitment File')
✅ Health Screening Questionnaire visible under 'Supervised Start / Health' with 'Still Needed' label
✅ Induction & Competency Assessment visible under 'Supervised Start / Health' with 'Still Needed' label
✅ Interview Record visible under 'Recruitment File' with 'Still Needed' label
✅ Recruitment Compliance Checklist visible under 'Recruitment File' with 'Still Needed' label
✅ Shows '18 approved · 0 ready for review · 4 still needed'
✅ Contract Acknowledgement shows as 'Checked & Approved' with 'Acknowledged' status
✅ Employee Handbook Acknowledgement shows as 'Checked & Approved' with 'Acknowledged' status
✅ Equal Opportunities Monitoring shows 'Does not affect compliance score' (optional item)
✅ Category counts correct: Legal & Safety (5/5), Core Training (6/6), Supervised Start / Health (0/2), Recruitment File (4/6), Agreements (2/2), Admin / Other (2/2)
critical_code_review_comments: CATEGORY_DISPLAY mapping at lines 2795-2802 correctly maps backend category IDs to user-friendly display names
categoryOrder at lines 2828-2835 correctly matches backend MANDATORY_ITEMS category order
Fix properly addresses the category mismatch that was hiding 4 items (3_Role_Readiness -> 3_Competency_Health, 4_Employment -> 4_Recruitment_Record)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Category mismatch bug fix verified. The What's Needed tab now correctly displays all 22 required items (plus 1 optional) across 6 categories. The fix was in CATEGORY_DISPLAY and categoryOrder mappings in EmployeeProfilePage.js lines 2795-2835. Previously 4 items were hidden because frontend used category names (3_Role_Readiness, 4_Employment) that didn't match backend (3_Competency_Health, 4_Recruitment_Record).

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Employee showed 81% progress but all visible items appeared complete - 4 items were hidden due to category mismatch
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Frontend CATEGORY_DISPLAY and categoryOrder used different category names than backend MANDATORY_ITEMS
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Updated CATEGORY_DISPLAY to map 3_Competency_Health -> 'Supervised Start / Health' and 4_Recruitment_Record -> 'Recruitment File'
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: All 22 items now visible, 4 'Still Needed' items correctly displayed, progress percentage matches visible counts
